description_long: This is an electric guitar with a solid body finished in a glossy white color, featuring a black pickguard and chrome hardware. The body has a classic single-cutaway design, reminiscent of Fender Telecaster models, with smooth contours and a flat top. The neck is made of a lighter wood, likely maple, and is fitted with a rosewood or similar dark fingerboard, marked with dot inlays. The headstock is a traditional shape with all tuning pegs aligned on one side, and the bridge is a fixed type with visible saddles. The guitar is equipped with two single-coil pickups, a three-way selector switch, and two control knobs for volume and tone. The overall construction suggests a robust instrument suitable for urban street performances or music venues.
description: A white, single-cutaway electric guitar with a black pickguard, chrome hardware, and a maple neck. It features two single-coil pickups and a classic headstock with all tuning pegs on one side.
description_view_0: Side view showing the guitar's slim profile, white body, and the full length of the maple neck.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the headstock with tuning pegs, the fingerboard, and the black pickguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the body contour, bridge, and the neck's attachment to the body.
description_view_3: Front view showing the face of the guitar, including the pickups, control knobs, and the full pickguard.
attribute_headstock_design: Classic Telecaster-style headstock with six inline tuning pegs and no visible logo
